title: IAIso ConsentScope decoded claims
description: The decoded payload of an IAIso consent JWT. See spec/consent/README.md.

iss.description: Issuer identifier. Verifier validates this equals its configured issuer.

sub.description: Subject — the entity the token was issued to.

exp.description: Expiry, Unix seconds. MUST be > iat.

jti.description: Unique token identifier. Used for revocation.

items.description: A dot-separated sequence of segments matching [a-z0-9_-]+.

scopes.description: Granted scopes. May be empty (an empty-authorization token).

execution_id.description: If present, token is valid only for this execution.

metadata.description: Caller-defined additional claims. Propagated to audit events.
